summary: Reworked the opening so it no longer shares the adjacent chapter's "By [time]" scaffold and tightened the handoff from chapter 13 by changing the research span to the rest of the weekend.
edits: Recast the first paragraph around the Eastbridge file on Dominic's desk instead of opening with a "By Monday morning" construction.
Changed the opening timeline from "the week after" to "the rest of the weekend" to align with the prior chapter's Saturday ending.
